title: lepyrodia elongata
intro: Lepyrodia elongata is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae, commonly known as the 'prickly horehound' due to its spiny leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lepyrodia elongata include relief from digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Lepyrodia elongata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
